catalyst_summary: SPY BULL SESSION 2026-06-15: SPY closed 754.37 (high 756.68 +0.6% from prior close). VIX 16.11 and FALLING — fear unwind continues. No macro catalysts today. **FOMC Wednesday 2026-06-17**: Rate decision at 14:00 ET — 13:30-15:00 ET hard no-trade window on BOTH accounts. Retail Sales 08:30 ET Wed (medium, premarket). Pre-FOMC drift typically bullish into the decision. Bold account closed a SPY752C runner at +$552 today after 10:27 ET entry — first confirmed live BULL win on the account.

primary_catalyst.name: FOMC Rate Decision — 2026-06-17
primary_catalyst.description: Federal Reserve rate decision Wednesday 2026-06-17 at 14:00 ET. Market expectation: hold at current rate. Pre-FOMC sessions (Mon-Tue) tend to trade with reduced volatility and slight bull drift as uncertainty is priced out. Immediate impact on Monday 2026-06-16: NONE directly — but position traders may keep size small going into Wednesday. The 13:30-15:00 ET no-trade window is MANDATORY on Wednesday, not Monday.
primary_catalyst.spy_impact: Monday clean — no direct FOMC impact. Wednesday block 13:30-15:00 ET. Bull bias intact as long as VIX stays below 17.20.
primary_catalyst.fragility: Any Fed speaker surprise Monday or Tuesday could spike VIX. Watch for headlines 09:00-16:00 ET.

secondary_catalysts.name: Retail Sales
secondary_catalysts.description: Medium-impact economic data. Hot (strong consumer) = bullish in isolation, but FOMC same day means market may read it as hawkish (Fed holds longer). Cool = Fed has cover to cut later = risk-on. Both prints could be reversed by FOMC reaction.
secondary_catalysts.fragility: Retail Sales volatility typically contained vs FOMC. 30-60 min price reaction max.

secondary_catalysts.name: PCE
secondary_catalysts.description: High-impact Fed's preferred inflation gauge. Not this week — flagged for awareness only.

secondary_catalysts.name: SPY new intraday high 756.68
secondary_catalysts.description: SPY reached 756.68 today — multi-month high. Tomorrow's PMH = 756.68, PML = 751.65, prior close 754.37. Bull continuation above 756.68 = fresh breakout, aggressive trail mode. Bear only if 751.65 breaks with BEAR ribbon.

vix_expectation: VIX 16.11 falling. LOW regime (below 17). Pre-FOMC Monday: expect VIX to stay 15-17 range unless news shock. BEAR gate tightens when VIX > 17.20. Current tape strongly favors BULL setups on any trigger confirmation.

key_levels_for_session.critical_level_note: First test of 756.68 tomorrow = the key decision bar. Break + hold above = fresh highs, trail mode. Rejection = midday stall/fade candidate. Bold already has a win at 752C today — accounts are clean for full participation.
key_levels_for_session.bear_scenario: SPY fails at 756.68 PMH and fades back through 754 then 751.65 PML with ribbon flip to BEAR → BEARISH_REJECTION entry candidate. Low probability without a news catalyst.
key_levels_for_session.bull_scenario: SPY opens above 754, confirms PMH 756.68 hold or breakout on morning bar with BULL ribbon → BULL entry. ORB watcher should fire if opening range < $2.00 and price breaks the range.
key_levels_for_session.no_trade_scenario: SPY oscillates 753-756 range in choppy pre-FOMC consolidation → watcher signals = developing, no clean trigger → wait, do not force.

implication_for_setups.bearish_setup: LOW PROBABILITY. Only if PMH 756.68 shows clear rejection pattern with BEAR ribbon and VIX ticking up above 17.
implication_for_setups.bullish_setup: PRIMARY. Gap-up continuation OR PMH breakout OR ORB_RETEST_LONG (OR range < $2.00). Look for level_reclaim + second trigger (ribbon_flip or confluence) for 10/11 Safe entry. Bold enters at 9/11 with positive ribbon.
implication_for_setups.watcher_observation: CRITICAL NOTE: watcher_live.py staleness fix (L90) deployed tonight — tomorrow is the FIRST session where all 6 watchers fire real intraday observations. Watch watcher-live-diag.jsonl for entries after 09:30. ORB watcher should fire if OR < $2.00 (common on trend days).
